retrieved_result: Acer Inc. SuccessStory Acer was founded by Stan Shih Chen Jung and his friends in 1976 with an initial investment of $25,000. They named the company ’Multitech International’ and started by designing hand-held electronic games and later went on to distribute semi-conductors which they had imported for lower costs from dev

history.title: Acer Inc. SuccessStory
history.description: Acer was founded by Stan Shih Chen Jung and his friends in 1976 with an initial investment of $25,000. They named the company ’Multitech International’ and started by designing hand-held electronic games and later went on to distribute semi-conductors which they had imported for lower costs from dev
